use_cases: Displaying user avatars in a messaging interface or contact list
Creating contact lists with profile pictures in chat applications
Building user profile display components with fallback initials
Implementing message recipient selection or conversation lists
Adding avatar components to social or collaboration platform UIs
ai_summary: A set of reusable Avatar components built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback to initials when images fail to load. Provides Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback subcomponents with customizable styling through Tailwind CSS. Suitable for building messaging interfaces, contact lists, and user profile displays in various applications.
